h1: Important Notes for Ordering Shared Projects in PCBWay Community

headings.text: Important Notes for Ordering Shared Projects in PCBWay Community

sections.heading: Important Notes for Ordering Shared Projects in PCBWay Community
sections.text: Blog > Important Notes for Ordering Shared Projects in PCBWay Community Important Notes for Ordering Shared Projects in PCBWay Community by: PCBWay Jun 25,2026 580 Views 0 Comments Posted in Help Center Thank you for supporting PCBWay Community. Please carefully review the following important notes before ordering a shared project: Project Images Images uploaded by designers are for reference only and may differ from the final product. Actual production will be based on the manufacturing files provided on the project page. Order Parameters PCBWay manufactures orders according to the parameters selected by the customer. Therefore, please carefully review the designer's notes and requirements...

sections.heading: Project Images
sections.text: Thank you for supporting PCBWay Community. Please carefully review the following important notes before ordering a shared project: Project Images Images uploaded by designers are for reference only and may differ from the final product. Actual production will be based on the manufacturing files provided on the project page. Order Parameters PCBWay manufactures orders according to the parameters selected by the customer. Therefore, please carefully review the designer's notes and requirements before ordering, and select the appropriate options accordingly (such as specified PCB thickness, surface finish, etc.). PCBWay is not responsible for any issues resulting from incorrect parameter selec...
